html:
Exclusive to:

Empty Marotter DenMarotter Den with stuff

The Marotter Den is a Boat-like structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be found floating around the Coast of the Ocean, in the Shallow water. A Marotter Den consists of a Den and a boat platform underneath.

A Marotter Den boat can be rowed or sailed around by a player like a normal boat, but will begin to degrade if it exits Shallow Water. Conversely, it will slowly repair itself if within Shallow Water. Crashing the boat into Sea Stacks or the edge of land will not create Leak on the boat, only cost health. When the boat is damaged, it can be repaired by Kelp Fronds or Kelp Patch. It will also regenerate health over time.

When the Den is destroyed, the boat will start to degrade until it breaks.

Each Marotter Den houses 2 Marotters that will fill their dens with loot that they collect around them. A Marotter Den has an internal inventory of 4 slots. Marotters will fill these slots with 1 of a given item that they enter with. However, if the Marotter Den is unloaded and the night segment of a day ends, it will instead slowly fill itself with items from an internal list, including things that a Marotter would normally be incapable of taking.

Should a Marotter Den automatically fill itself, it will draw from this list of drops.

Item Chance
6.25%
12.5%

Trivia

  • Years before any version of them were implemented, an unused and land-bound version of them was datamined from the Don't Starve: Newhome Beta files.

Gallery

  • Marotter dens burned.
  • Marotter dens as they appear with stuff in them.
  • Marotter dens as they appear when destroyed.
  • Marotter dens as they appear when they have nothing in them.
  • Marotter Den concept art from Staying Afloat update stream from Rhymes with Play.
  • Original Datamined Otter dens.
  • hit
  • Original Otter Den texture

Empty Marotter DenMarotter Den with stuff
“Otter den that, there's not much else there.”
–Wilson, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Looks empty. Might as well torch it.”
–Willow, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Wolfgang see nothing to get.”
–Wolfgang, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“It has nothing.”
–Wendy, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“TYPICAL”
–WX-78, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Nothing there at all.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Left nothin' for us.”
–Woodie, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Nothing. Am I supposed to be sad for the smelly brigand?”
–Maxwell, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Empty, alas.”
–Wigfrid, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“We don't see anything.”
–Webber, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“I don't see anything there.”
–Warly, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“No things”
–Wormwood, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Looks tapped out.”
–Winona, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Nada? Another otter den then.”
–Wortox, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Glorp! No fishrat stuff!”
–Wurt, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Looks like nothing. Oh well!”
–Walter, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“Empty. Let's move on.”
–Wanda, when examining an empty Marotter den.
“I otter have a closer look.”
–Wilson, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“I should take whatever's in there. Then torch it.”
–Willow, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Ooh, maybe something for Wolfgang?”
–Wolfgang, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“If I take what's there, the creature may starve.”
–Wendy, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“I WILL TAKE EVERYTHING EVEN IF I DON'T NEED IT”
–WX-78, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“It's left its loot behind.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“What do we have here?”
–Woodie, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Oh, goody.”
–Maxwell, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“There is löot for the taking.”
–Wigfrid, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“We see treats inside!”
–Webber, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Shall we raid this pantry?”
–Warly, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Steal from Stealy Friend?”
–Wormwood, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“It might have left us some goodies.”
–Winona, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Let's clean out this clawed klepto.”
–Wortox, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“Play stealing game with fishrat, flort!”
–Wurt, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“I think we have a winner, Woby!”
–Walter, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.
“There's something. Hope it's worthwhile.”
–Wanda, when examining a Marotter den with stuff in it.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hang Marotter là một công trình kiến ​​trúc giống như chiếc Thuyền dành riêng cho Don't Starve Together. Nó có thể được tìm thấy trôi nổi quanh Bờ Biển Đại Dương, ở vùng nước Nông. Marotter Den bao gồm một Den và một bệ thuyền bên dưới.
